title: The Flywheel Effect
author: From: Good to Great
content: Sustainable success comes from the accumulation of small wins that eventually create unstoppable momentum.
action: Action: Identify one 'small win' that contributes to your long-term goal.

title: Conway’s Law
author: From: The Mythical Man-Month
content: Organizations design systems that mirror their own communication structures. To change your output, you must change your team's communication.
action: Action: Audit your communication channels for bottlenecks.

title: Pre-Mortem Analysis
author: From: Thinking in Bets
content: Before starting a project, assume it has failed. Ask yourself: 'What went wrong?' This uncovers hidden risks.
action: Action: Run a pre-mortem on your next major task.

title: Single-Tasking
author: From: The Productivity Project
content: Multitasking is a myth; you are simply switching tasks rapidly and paying a 'switching cost' in cognitive performance.
action: Action: Set a timer for 60 minutes of single-tasking.

title: Accountability Partners
author: From: The 4-Hour Workweek
content: External commitment to a peer dramatically increases the likelihood of follow-through compared to internal willpower alone.
action: Action: Commit to a progress report deadline with a peer.
